title: uragoga manillensis
intro: Uragoga manillensis, also known as the Philippine gentian, is a perennial plant species native to the Philippines. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Uragoga manillensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its use in treating fever and digestive problems. Uragoga manillensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be taken in capsule or tablet form as a herbal supplement.
